title: UNI community celebrates record day of giving during milestone year
summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa marked a record-setting day of giving as 2,174 donors came together for Live Purple Give Gold, surpassing the goal of 1,876 donors set in honor of the university’s founding year and sesquicentennial celebration.
title_cn: 北爱荷华大学在建校150周年里程碑年举办的捐赠日活动创历史纪录

title: UNI honors recipients of 2026 Student Leadership Awards
summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa honored student accomplishments and service at its annual Student Leadership Awards ceremony on Tuesday, April 14.
title_cn: 北爱荷华大学表彰2026年度学生领导力奖获奖者

title: University of Northern Iowa announces 2026 Lux Service Award winners
summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa has named Lane Kruger and Anya Lovstuen the recipients of the 2026 Lux Service Award, the highest honor given by the Division of Student Life recognizing graduating seniors for exceptional service.
title_cn: 北爱荷华大学公布2026年度勒克斯服务奖获奖者名单

title: Applications open for the 2026 John Pappajohn Iowa Entrepreneurial Venture Competition
summary_en: The twenty-first annual statewide competition will award $100,000 in cash prizes to Iowa startups and entrepreneurial ventures, joining other startups from University of Northern Iowa John Pappajohn Entrepreneurial Center (UNI JPEC) alumni that have received this critical funding support.
title_cn: 2026年约翰·帕帕约翰艾奥瓦创业企业竞赛开放报名

title: Oksana Grybovych Hafermann named American Council on Education Fellow
summary_en: The American Council on Education (ACE) announced on Wednesday that UNI Chief of Staff Oksana Grybovych Hafermann has been named an ACE Fellow for the 2026-27 academic year. Following nominations by the senior administration of their institutions and a rigorous application process, 31 Fellows were selected this year.
title_cn: 奥克萨娜·格里博维奇·哈弗曼获选为2026-2027学年美国教育理事会研究员
